qa_pairs.question: What should a user do if a required software is only accessible in an older version of the standard environment on the Narval cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: If a required software is only accessible in an older version of the standard environment on Narval, users are invited to send a request to technical support.

qa_pairs.question: Which BLAS and LAPACK library is currently recommended for use on the Narval cluster, and what is the reason for this recommendation?
qa_pairs.answer: FlexiBLAS is now favoured for use on the Narval cluster because the Intel MKL library, while functional on AMD processors, is not optimal. More details can be found on the BLAS and LAPACK page.
